title: How we collect and use information :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## How we collect and use information
We collect, use and match information with other New Zealand government departments to manage border risks.
- How we collect and use information about people flying in and out of New Zealand INZ manages border risks by collecting information about foreign nationals who fly here. You have the right to access your information and ask us to correct it.

## How we collect and use information about people flying in and out of New Zealand
INZ manages border risks by collecting information about foreign nationals who fly here. You have the right to access your information and ask us to correct it.
- Information matching with other government departments We share the personal information you give us with other New Zealand government agencies.

## Information matching with other government departments
We share the personal information you give us with other New Zealand government agencies.
